On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go.

programme.title: No.17 Music Live House S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Five popular musicians, Liang Long, Hu Xia, Bai Jugang, Curly G, and Huang Zihongfan, reversed their image as singers and served as Live House staff, starting this music journey again with a new attitude. At the same time, with the new slogan "There is always happiness to speak out", the program will witness more beauty and surprises in the music they deliver to the audience.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 50
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 18
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Bi De managed to rescue Wan Er from the kidnappers. Wan Er discovers that the person in front of her is actually Bi De, and not Bi An. Bi De confesses to Wan Er that he comes from the future.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 25
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) When Shilan sees that Xiangjun refuses to come home, she sends Xiangjun's manager to the Jin family the next day to stir up trouble, trying to force them to send Xiangjun back.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 26
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Paparazzi catch Taizhu and Xiangjun in an intimate moment. Xiangmin goes to Taizhu's house to cause trouble. Fearing things may escalate further, Enzhu rushes there with Shilan.

programme.title: Freedom Travelers - EP 2
programme.desc: Rongrong and Mile take a coastal road trip through Busan, starting with seaside ramyeon that brings back Mile’s school-day memories. They ride the Sky Capsule and stroll along the Skywalk, soaking in blue ocean views, and meet a friendly local street vendor. After a seafood BBQ at their ocean-view campervan, they witness the stunning Haman Fire Festival, ending the night in a glow of tradition and sea breeze.

programme.title: Tale of the Nine-tailed - EP 6
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Flashbacks show Li Yan and Zhiya’s tragic romance during the Joseon era. Li Yan faces a trial for killing the shaman.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 91
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Freedom Travelers - EP 2
programme.desc: Rongrong and Mile take a coastal road trip through Busan, starting with seaside ramyeon that brings back Mile’s school-day memories. They ride the Sky Capsule and stroll along the Skywalk, soaking in blue ocean views, and meet a friendly local street vendor. After a seafood BBQ at their ocean-view campervan, they witness the stunning Haman Fire Festival, ending the night in a glow of tradition and sea breeze.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 20
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 3
programme.desc: A small business opportunity gives Lian Man'er hope, but competition and family interference threaten to derail her plans. As misunderstandings arise, Shen Nuo unexpectedly steps in to lend a hand, leaving Lian Man'er curious about his true intentions.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 4
programme.desc: Lian Man'er's efforts gradually bring positive changes to the household, but success also attracts jealousy from relatives who would rather see her fail. Faced with fresh obstacles, she chooses to confront problems head-on instead of backing down.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 285
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Endless Barbecue 2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Adopting a bolder perspective and more expressive storytelling, this season dives deep into streets and alleys to document the barbecue culture and everyday lives of ordinary people. Six episodes, six flavors, capturing the warmth and passion of life amidst the sizzling flames.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 21
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven - EP 11
programme.desc: The 7 individuals were all involved in the heated case of a missing girl. As they attempt to escape their fate and pursue the truth, they find themselves embroiled in secrets, lies, and desires in this retribution tale.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 481
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: The Return of The Lame Hero
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A police academy graduate is crippled on his first day fighting pickpockets. Now posing as a disabled beggar, he infiltrates the thieves' guild. Guided by veteran cop Da Zhou, he slowly uncovers the gang's secret hierarchy.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 7
programme.desc: Struggling with the responsibilities of her royal identity, Yang Ying nearly jeopardises the diplomatic mission through a series of mistakes. While Ning Yuanzhou patiently trains her in court etiquette, Ren Ruyi offers guidance in her own way, helping Yang Ying gain confidence.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 15
programme.desc: Lei Kin finds herself caught between protecting someone she cares about and revealing the truth she has kept hidden for years. Her decision could alter the course of Ching-lam's investigation forever.

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven - EP 11
programme.desc: The 7 individuals were all involved in the heated case of a missing girl. As they attempt to escape their fate and pursue the truth, they find themselves embroiled in secrets, lies, and desires in this retribution tale.

programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 16
programme.desc: As hidden motives gradually come to light, Ching-lam begins to question whether revenge has blinded him to the people standing beside him. A heartfelt conversation with Ying-fung encourages him to rethink what he truly seeks.

programme.title: Bos Galak Kesabaran Setipis Tisu
programme.desc: A handsome and wealthy man named Radit (Cakrawala Airawan) is troubled because his grandmother is pressuring him to find a life partner. programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.desc: Takdir is a program that discusses disasters, problems, and destiny in human life with various situations in real life.

programme.title: Horang Kaya Dengan Kearifan Cinta Lokalnya
programme.desc: Maya's (Jennifer Eve) family suddenly receives a windfall, becoming wealthy and wealthy. Maya's father, wanting a comfortable new home for his family, decides to buy a luxury home. Meanwhile, Aryan (Fauzan Nasrul), a young man, has just returned to Indonesia from abroad. Upon arriving home, he is shocked to discover that his house has become Maya's family's. A dispute ensues between Aryan and Maya's family.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT - EP 10
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: HIKMAH - EP 23
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: Hati Lagi Kosong Eh Jagoan Mama Muncul
programme.desc: Dafa is a spoiled, innocent boy. It turns out he has a crush on the campus hottie, Wini. While he's watching Wini, he accidentally bumps into Indah, who agrees to babysit Dafa on campus. After a while, a misunderstanding arises between Dafa and Indah, which ultimately leads to Indah leaving and no longer babysitting Dafa.

programme.title: Hati Abang Satpol PP Dibadutin Jangan
programme.desc: Regina (Indah Nicole) works as a clown. Regina does this job because it is the only skill she has and it is easy to do without requiring a high level of education. One day, while Regina was performing in the city center, a group of public order officers came to conduct a raid. Regina panicked when she was chased by a handsome public order officer (Eza Gionino). She ran as fast as she could.

programme.title: TERCYDUK - EP 61
programme.desc: This reality show investigates the root causes of various dramatic and emotionally draining personal and social cases. Then find a way out to help the parties who are victims

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 32
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Gara Gara Gecko No Jomblo Jomblo
programme.desc: A beautiful girl (Nabila Zavira) has a phobia of geckos. That day, a gecko fell on her, but she doesn't believe in superstition and will still go to Jakarta, even though her mother forbids it. However, upon arriving in Jakarta, the girl meets a boss (Rizky Alatas) who has a pet reptile named Gecko. From there, the girl works around while looking after Gecko. Unfortunately, when the girl looks for Gecko in the cashier's drawer, she is suspected of stealing.

programme.title: Mudik Jangan Bawa Hati Nanti Sulit Kembali
programme.desc: Intan and her colleague Dodo were entrusted with a luxury car that someone left at their office for two weeks. Intan and Dodo then planned to take the car back to their hometown, or “mudik.” Dodo pretended to be Intan's driver in her hometown. Intan claimed to be wealthy. On the other hand, Dodo claimed to be the car's owner and flirted with the girls in the village, even though he was actually a car mechanic.

programme.title: Cinta Sat Set Dikejar Target Biar Mencapai Omset
programme.desc: Just days before her highly anticipated wedding to Reno (Kevin Hillers), Sheila (Aliyah Faizah) suddenly panics and runs away. Desperate to avoid a family scandal, her mother pressures her younger sister, Meisya (Amanda Salmakhira), to put on the dress and take her place at the altar. Meisya fiercely rejects the absurd idea, finding an unlikely ally in Reno, who insists he will only marry the woman who left him

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 13
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Lengah Dikit Langsung Diangkut Cintamu
programme.desc: Fathiya (Ina Marika) makes a living selling football jerseys on the sidewalk, constantly playing a high-stakes game of hide-and-seek with municipal police (Satpol PP) raids. During a frantic chase, a panicking Fathiya throws her massive bag of merchandise through an open car window into the arms of a stranger named Ridho (Cakrawala Airawan). Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Romantika Cinta Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: The arrival of a beautiful new teacher, Intan (Larasati Nugroho), instantly captivates a young student named Ferdi (Dimas Putra). Ferdi's older brother, Fahmi (El Ryan Carlen)—who also teaches at the school—strictly forbids the crush, arguing that Ferdi is far too young. However, as Fahmi and Intan are continuously paired up for school projects, they genuinely fall for each other, igniting a furious sibling rivalry as Ferdi accuses his brother of betrayal.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 39
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: JODOH GAK ADA YANG TEMPE
programme.desc: Maura and Theo's first meeting was indeed very annoying, but how exciting is their story?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 186
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Salam Santun Akang Satpam Skin Oppa
programme.desc: Prita (Larasati Nugroho) is a Betawi girl obsessed with everything K-Pop. When she meets Jaka (Farhan Rasyid), who has an oriental look, she immediately calls him 'Oppa' and dreams of marrying him. However, her father has other plans, insisting she marry the local guy, Roni (Angga Putra).

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 14
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Nggak Espek Mba Jamu Pelukable Banget
programme.desc: Dewi (Shanice Margaretha) is a beautiful and kind-hearted traditional herbal medicine (jamu) vendor who is adored by everyone in her village. One day, while out selling her drinks, she stumbles upon a man named Reno (Masaji Wijayanto) washed up on the riverbank. Shocked to find him still breathing, she quickly saves his life. As the two grow closer during his recovery, their budding connection sparks intense jealousy among the local men who have been desperately trying to win Dewi's heart.

She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them. programme.title: Ikan Hiu Ngegosip I Love You Bu Hansip
programme.desc: Saripah (Larasati Nugroho) finds herself in deep trouble with Jordy (El Ryan Carlen) following a chaotic incident where she mistakenly tried to 'secure' his house. While a reasonable Jordy realizes it was a mere misunderstanding and forgives her, his furious family refuses to let it go and threatens a lawsuit. To make matters worse, Saripah returns home only to face an ultimatum from her father: marry the local guy, Tejo (Adhitya Alkatiri), immediately, or face his wrath

programme.title: Tumbang Setekah Mencoba Mengalahkan Prime Neng Pasar
programme.desc: Devan (Farhan Rasyid) is a handsome university student writing his thesis on marketplace culture. His research takes a chaotic turn on his first day at the market when he clashes with Alya (Adzwa Aurell), a feisty female truck driver who is already having a terrible day. Desperate to continue his studies but banned from her sight, Devan is forced to go completely undercover to blend into the market without Alya recognizing him.

programme.title: Mahaguru Spontan - EP 4
programme.desc: Rancangan penuh gelak ketawa dari Istana Budaya ke kaca tv rumah anda. Pelawak hebat Malaysia berkongsi pentas dengan Dato' Siti Nurhaliza dalam perlbagai segmen menarik istimewa untuk anda lebaran ini.

programme.title: Miss Lawak - EP 4
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki selain Erra Fazira & Dato' AC Mizal sebagai juri tetap, siapakah di antara 18 gadis yang bakal merebut gelaran juara Miss Lawak 2019?

programme.title: Buka Kedai : Now In Tokyo - EP 2
programme.desc: Buka Kedai: Now in Tokyo menampilkan 4 selebriti Malaysia yang terdiri daripada Nabila Huda, Shashic, Leona dan Eric. Mereka bakal melakukan misi berniaga di Tokyo, Jepun.

programme.title: Tanya Sama Pokok - EP 2
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang kehidupan di sebuah kampung moden yang sudah semakin terdedah dengan kemodenan tetapi dalam waktu yang sama masih mengekalkan ciri-ciri hidup berkampung.

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 20

programme.title: Komediri - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan 'Stand Up Comedy' yang mempersembahkan 3 pelawak dan di hoskan oleh Harith Iskander.

programme.title: Ludo
programme.desc: Four wildly different stories overlap at the whims of fate, chance and one eccentric criminal.

programme.title: Manjummel Boys

programme.title: Justice Choudhary
programme.desc: Justice Chowdhary gives up his moral values and determines to seek revenge after his entire family is abducted and killed in his presence.

programme.title: Sabhapathy

programme.desc: A murder accusation turns a movie star's own life into an eccentric action thriller as he flees the country, with a vengeful politician hot on his heels.

programme.desc: An 80-year-old man with a penchant for real life games in a story about rights and wrongs.

programme.desc: A filmmaker stands trial when a costume assistant on his movie accuses him of rape.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Objectif Monde - EP 10
programme.desc: 'Objectif Monde'' proposes special reports and investigations into societal or geopolitical issues, taking the time to analyse the situations thanks to different specialist opinions. This TV5MONDE programme is produced with French-speaking partners (RTBF, RTS, Radio-Canada, France Televisions) and the support of the public French-speaking media.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Following a colleague's sexual assault, Louise, a semi-skilled worker with a strong character, decides it's time to end the permanent ambiance of sexism and bullying that's reigned in their printing works for years. A veritable revolution that Louise and her female colleagues are determined to see through to the end.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 14
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: Les Joueuses #Paslapourdanser
programme.desc: The Olympique Lyonnais players are among the best having gone from victory to victory and won the French championship thirteen times. A glimpse into their daily lives, asking us to change the way we look at the place of women in sport, where the values of respect and openness are essential to move towards equality.

programme.title: Un Bon Garcon
programme.desc: Max, a talented 16-year-old swimmer, is getting ready to enter the sports studies programme. Between training sessions and outings with his friends, he leads the life of an average teenager. But when the police turn up one day to question his coach, who has been accused of sexual abuse, his regulated life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Piscine Pro
programme.desc: With a degree in history and civilisation, Charles-Olivier is struggling to find a job in his field. He eventually takes a job as a clerk in a swimming pool shop. With his spirits low, he's getting by as best he can.

programme.title: Natures Humaines - EP 3
programme.desc: To avoid arguments, Real changes the duos for the next activity: finding the way to the chalet with a compass. Bonds are formed and the students reveal more about themselves.

programme.title: Natures Humaines - EP 4
programme.desc: After three days, Real feels that the couples are ready for a more important experience: sleeping in the forest. A pivotal night for the three duos who feel the lack of privacy in their shelter weighs on them.

programme.title: Natures Humaines - EP 5
programme.desc: Finding the students sullen after their night of winter camping, Real suggests a handicraft activity to them: making a catapult.

programme.title: Natures Humaines - EP 6
programme.desc: On the programme for the final day: the participants have to make a totem that represents them. When they reveal the results of their work, they show considerable vulnerability.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 8
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: 64' Actu

programme.title: Movie - Thoranai
programme.desc: Murugan comes to Chennai in search of his long-lost brother who had run away from home twenty years ago. He finds him caught in a gang war between two clans and tries to convince him to return home.

programme.title: Movie - Kundakka Mandakka
programme.desc: Ilango aspires to get his sister married to a millionaire. For this, he tries his best to find a rich suitor, but ultimately realises that money is not everything and lets her marry the one she loves.

programme.title: Movie - Sivarathri
programme.desc: Gayathri, a pious woman, is married to Mohan, a businessman. Their life takes a turn when their child, Raja, obtains special powers after visiting an old temple.

programme.title: Movie - Solla Solla Inikkum
programme.desc: Sathya is a happy-go-lucky lad who enjoys spending time with his friends. But soon his life completely changes when he falls for girls who do not reciprocate his feelings.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Senkoattai
programme.desc: After foiling an assassination attempt on the PM, CBI officer Shekhar follows the lead on a foreigner, Franka. But, this in turn leads him to a minister, Thirumurthy, who is the real masterminded.

programme.title: Movie - Junior Senior
programme.desc: Two friends, Santosh and Shakti, fall in love with the same woman. When the woman chooses Santosh due to his financial status, the latter decides to call off their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Uzhaithu Vaazha Vendum
programme.desc: Raja, a poor man, lives with his family that is dependent on his future job. However, instead of taking up their responsibility, he falls for a wealthy Sandhya and lies to her to win her attention.

programme.title: Movie - Raakhee
programme.desc: A young man takes the law into his own hands; at first, it's to punish the people responsible for his sister's death, but he soon starts to target all those who have harassed women in the name of dowry.

programme.title: Movie - Dharma Prabhu
programme.desc: Yama attempts to save an innocent child and accidentally rescues a corrupt politician along with her. Lord Shiva, who is furious about Yama's mistake, gives him an ultimatum to amend the situation.

programme.title: Movie - Ullasa Paravaigal
programme.desc: Unable to come to terms with the death of his girlfriend, Ravi becomes lonely and despondent. Ravi's father and friend encourage him to take some time away and when he reunites with an old childhood friend, he spirits lift once more.

programme.title: Movie - Sorgathin Thirappu Vizha
programme.desc: This film is directed by A Jagannathan, starring Jai Ganesh, Jayachitra Ganesh and Jayamalini in the lead roles.

programme.title: Movie - Suba Muhurtham
programme.desc: Movie starring Kapil Dev,Sulakshana,S.V.Shekher directed by Raghu, Music by S.M.Subbaiah Naidu.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Sippikkul Muthu
programme.desc: Sivayya, a person with autism, lives in a village with his grandmother. Things take a turn when he marries a widow, Lalitha, in order to save her from the atrocities of widowhood.

programme.title: Movie - Alli Arjuna
programme.desc: Arivu lives with his friends in an old bungalow whose owner is fondly known as 'Daddy' and runs an eatery. Soon, Savitri enters his life after he offers to help her when her groom disappears.

programme.title: Movie - Kizhakku Vaasal
programme.desc: When an influential man from the village tries to molest Thaayamma, an orphan, she escapes from his clutches and is saved by Ponnurangam. Eventually, they fall in love.

programme.title: Movie - Looty
programme.desc: Childless couple Rasappa and Geetha adopt the child abandoned in their car. However, problems ensue when Geetha suspects her husband to be the biological father of the child.

programme.title: Movie - Ayan
programme.desc: Deva works for Arumugam, a smuggler, who has taken care of him for many years. However, when his best friend gets killed, Deva decides to help the police to nab a dangerous drug lord.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The ASB Classic is an annual event played on outdoor hard courts at the ASB Tennis Centre. It was first played in 1956 and is now a showcase of the sport’s strong competition across the globe.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Travelers Championship is a professional golf tournament on the PGA Tour in Cromwell, Connecticut, a suburb south of Hartford. Since 1984 the tournament has been held at TPC River Highlands. The tournament was founded 73 years ago in 1952. Over the last decade, longer hitters have done well at the tournament, with Stewart Cink, Hunter Mahan, J. J. Henry, Phil Mickelson, and Bubba Watson combining for six victories over a 10-year span.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026
programme.desc: A look back at the 24th edition of the Madrid Open from the clay courts of Caja Mágica in Manzanares Park, San Fermín.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Badminton Unlimited 2026
programme.desc: Catch all the happenings in and around the world of badminton here on the show Badminton Unlimited.

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: Billie Jean King Cup by Gainbridge Qualifiers 2026
programme.desc: Relive all the tension and drama from seven victorious nations as they booked their spot in the finals in China, Shenzhen.

programme.title: ATP Originals Series
programme.desc: This 43-minute piece delves into the man behind The Ringmaster, as Alexander Bublik gives an exclusive insight into his philosophy and rise to the Top 10.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Travelers Championship is a professional golf tournament on the PGA Tour in Cromwell, Connecticut, a suburb south of Hartford. Since 1984 the tournament has been held at TPC River Highlands. The tournament was founded 73 years ago in 1952. Over the last decade, longer hitters have done well at the tournament, with Stewart Cink, Hunter Mahan, J. J. Henry, Phil Mickelson, and Bubba Watson combining for six victories over a 10-year span.

programme.title: FS MMA Mark Burch vs. Kazuo Takahashi
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mark Burch looks to welcome Kazuo 'Yoshiki' Takahashi to BodogFIGHT in Costa Rica. Kazuo is the original "King of Pancrase" and he looks to pad his win record against a tough opponent in Mark Burch.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: This episode features a light heavyweight championship match between Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. from Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York, USA, on November 8, 2008. A total of 14,152 were in attendance at Madison Square Garden to see Calzaghe in his last professional bout, but would he go out a winner?

programme.title: Greatest Classics Roberto Duran vs. Sean Fitzgerald
programme.desc: One of the greatest fighters of all time, Boxing Hall of Famer Roberto Duran, continues his comeback against Worcester, Massachusetts native Sean Fitzgerald. Duran would enter the bout coming off three straight victories, looking to continue his run towards another shot at a world championship. He would get more than he bargained for against the young undefeated Fitzgerald, who gave Duran a more competitive fight than anyone could have expected. programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 9
programme.desc: The day starts when Duggee moves a cupboard, and the Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind it. It's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels aren't sure what a diary is, so Duggee explains by reading some extracts. The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: It's a lovely day, so everyone is playing outside. Things take a turn when Roly needs a wee, because the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. The Squirrels start looking around for it, but they have no luck. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector, Helen. After demonstrating it to the Squirrels, they are very keen to give it a go.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 112
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa‐Laa and Po drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. The Teletubbies have fun getting dizzy on the Tubby Spinny.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 18
programme.desc: Max and Monty's antics on a construction site get them into trouble when they ignore the danger warning signs.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 19
programme.desc: After Thomas loses his voice, he must find a new way to pass on a very important message.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 20
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 44
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 45
programme.desc: After watching a solar eclipse, the team head into space to fix the biggest glitch yet!

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 47
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is drilling into the ground below the ocean near Academy Island, looking for bubbly mud that is heated up by an underground volcano. Back at the Academy, the Go Jetters have been monitoring the underground volcano and discover that it is showing more activity than usual. This is because Glitch has been drilling into it, and it could mean that the volcano is going to erupt!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Preston needs to knock down his shed, and Mojo has the wrecking ball to do it. But first, Mojo and Bo have to get it all the way across town, which is harder than it sounds!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Supertato is determined to rescue Tomato's precious jewel after Evil Pea steals it.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Evil Pea swaps Supertato's Tato-Belt with her own evil Baddie-Belt.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Chilli becomes Super Chilli as he tries to be a superhero just like Supertato.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 19
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 20
programme.desc: It's one of those days. The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit ... hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections. They busy themselves doing the collecting bit, and then display their precious things in the clubhouse.

programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 41
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 42
programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 43
programme.desc: While on a camping holiday, Bluey makes a new friend named called Jean-Luc. Bluey may not understand him, but they find a common language playing and hunting for a wild Daddy pig.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to explore the Okavango Delta in Botswana, Africa, in search of hippos. Along the way, Andy meets a giraffe, hitches a ride with an oxpecker and gets stuck in the mud with fighting hippos.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Bonito in the Amazon rainforest on a global adventure to witness piraputanga, a species of fish, leaping from the water to feed on wild berries in the trees above. Along the way, they meet a troop of brown capuchins.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 76
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun moving backwards and forwards. The Tubby Custard Ride goes forwards, then backwards, then forwards again!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'clock', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of clocks - square, round, one with numbers and one that makes a really loud sound! We see Dee watching the clock when her train is late and a little clock and their grandfather! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Messy brushes his teeth, but why must we use toothpaste and a toothbrush to get teeth clean? He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.desc: Jackson's big, blue chicken-thing, Ludwig, is going to lay an egg. And it's up to Mojo and Bo to carry the big bird across dangerous roads to Preston's egg-hatching shed!

programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year’s Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he’s determined to stay up with the big kids and join the fun. But as the night goes on, an exhausted Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang. He ultimately realizes that missing your bedtime isn’t all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When fun-loving, water-dwelling tadpole LALA shows up in Gloria’s tank, the two become underwater besties! But when Molly wants Gloria to spend “Palentine’s Day” with her, Gloria can’t admit she’s already made plans to spend it with her “land” friends and runs herself ragged running back and forth between Molly and the gang. Gloria’s attempts to make everyone happy backfire, leading her to learn that she can have different groups of friends, and it’s okay to play with them one at a time, or all

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a cat-in-the-box that startles Gabby, giving her the hiccups. Dr. Pandy and the Gabby Cats try several cures, but it isn't until CatRat scares the hiccups out of Gabby that they go away!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: Sherman accidentally swallows Sweet Tune's magic flute and gets a case of magical hiccups, creating complete chaos on the show.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Sherman wants to pull his loose tooth for Tooth Fairy cash, Peabody brings a historical dentist on the show. Sherman's fear causes problems.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: After a fight with her mom, Jun joins Tom on an adventure into the Fire Realm, where the knowledge of myths saves the day.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When a tiny Fireworm dragon ends up at ICARIS, Alex has to decide between her moms’ excitement and keeping the dragon secret.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Set on reclaiming his throne, Uncle King Julien convinces Julien to go into Foosa territory. Julien creates a disguise and forces Maurice to join him.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Clover is forced to take a vacation, and while she's away, she meets the handsome and free-spirited Sage Moondancer.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Puss misses the old days adventuring with his buddy Jack Sprat. Fearful he will leave San Lorenzo, Dulcinea concocts a super special adventure surprise with the orphans. But Jack Sprat shows up with the promise of a damsel in distress… who turns out to be a super scary monster.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Puss and Dulcinea embark on an adventure to find the Fountain of Youth to save Puss' old mentor, El Guante Blanco.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are captured and must find a way to escape the Dragon Fighting arena and survive an attack from the fearsome Triple Stryke dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: After the Riders save a Deathsong egg from the Dragon Hunters, they must take it back to Melody Island when the hatched baby won't stop crying.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bored of the viewing options on window, Thunk realizes what he’s been missing – real life drama! But when Thunk starts creating drama around the farm, the others set out to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Sandy is finally old enough to join Grug and Eep for the annual Daddy Daughter Day and Grug couldn’t be more excited. But when Sandy struggles to fit in with Grug and Eep’s traditions, Grug has second thoughts. It isn’t until Sandy goes missing that Grug realizes it’s time to start a new tradition.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: When Phil humiliates himself playing throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys, the Croods band together to help him regain his confidence. Unfortunately, Phil goes from confident to cocky and bets the farm on a game of throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys. Can the Croods overcome the punch monkeys - and Phil - to save the farm?

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: Finally promoted to CEO, Boss Baby sets his sights on achieving 100% Baby Love, while dealing with the annoying Puppies and Preeks who rented Baby Corp office space while Boss was gone. Tim and Danny become local heroes after saving a baby's life.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: Boss Baby encounters a new threat to Baby Love: an adorable Baby TV show starring Pyg the Pygmy Goat, Tam the Tamandua, and their host Maria-Maria. Boss is told not to go to Corporate War by Board Baby Emiliano, so Boss tries to provoke his enemies to make the first move.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: Boss promises Tim he'll help make their parents' anniversary present, but after Puppy Co. and Baby Corp's fight over a conference room escalates, he sends Hendershot is his stead. Hendershot, armed with a file on all of Tim's wants and needs, tries to keep Tim happy.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Jun breaks the rules by sneaking a small, adorable dragon out of the Crystal Realm and bringing it home, but finds that her older brother, Eugene, has arrived and watches her every move.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Tom has to keep his mom, Olivia, distracted while Jun, Alex, and D’Angelo use a new dragon to close off a cave leading to the Crystal Realm, and prevent her from discovering the dragons.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: When Feather is taken by a group of what appear to be zombie dragons, Alex finds her inner hero and rescues her friend.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Jim is excited to test-drive a Vespa for his birthday but things quickly go awry when he must fight Bular's flying Vulture Troll sent to hunt him down.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Jim uses a courage-enhancing "Grit Shaka" to accelerate his training, but nearly gets himself killed when he hunts down Bular and Toby must save him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: The gang breaks into Stricklers office for clues to Killahead Bridge but ends up releasing a monster into school and Strickler reveals his true form.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Dinotrux S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Ty gets jealous when a Hydrodon named Flynt becomes everyone's new hero, but when a blazing fire heads towards the ravine, Ty must ask Flynt for help

programme.title: Casper's Scare School S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Accidental Hero In order to win the Fright Stuff Award, Casper consults his uncles for scaring advice. Rich Kid Ra When Ra pulls up to Scare School in a solid gold chariot, everyone suddenly wants to be his best friend.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Dragon Quest The unlucky staff of a medieval-themed restaurant in Deedstown, get an unfriendly visit from Professor Thurdigree Burns. Opposite Day When Wolfie's experiment with moonlight goes awry, everyone but Casper turns into his or her opposite.

programme.title: Rupert Bear S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Rupert, Ping Pong, Bill and Ming help the Cloud Shepherd find some missing clouds that have sneaked away to play. But how can the friends get them back up into the sky?

programme.title: Rupert Bear S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Ming gets stuck up a tree, Rupert, Ping Pong and Bill try to rescue her but, thanks to Edward's mistakes, they all get stuck too. Can Edward overcome his fear of heights and save them?

programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But it turns out that someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the Royal Knighting Ceremony! It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Gabby receives a special nighttime delivery, unboxing a glow-in-the-dark train engine. However, she realizes that she's missing the other three train cars to complete the whole train. The Gabby Cats help Gabby build the other three glow-in-the-dark train cars by creating shapes through interactive/musical games. In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, DJ Catnip sings a song.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: On Junior Marshals’ Day at the fire station, Melman gets stuck in a firetruck on its way to a real emergency. With Alex’s help, Melman must overcome his fear of heights to help save a stuck cat, and learn that even heroes get scared sometimes.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When both Sam and Gabriel pre-order the new Commander Kale comic but the supplier only sends one copy, TZG secretly ferries the comic book back and forth between readers. / When Fawna teaches a silent yoga class, TZG secretly find and remove a loud chirping cricket from the Community Center.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Gloria wants spring to come! She’s SICK of winter and is counting down the days until the Central Park pond melts so she can retrieve a toy she lost in the water before it froze! So when Goldie the Groundhog predicts more winter, Gloria sets out to make spring come, by any means necessary! When she fails at controlling the weather, Gloria learns that when something doesn’t go your way, embrace Plan B!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show S2 - EP 44
programme.desc: Sherman's comic goes missing and it's up to Peabody to find out who took it and why…

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: Peabody lets Agamemnon and his frat bros crash the show in an effort to impress them and join their fraternity.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: During an attempt to get displaced Fire Gronckles back to their native Fire Realm, D’Angelo makes a mistake by accidentally feeding them Catastrophic Quaken eggs.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Eugene discovers the Lair and demands a dragon of his own.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Julien teams up with Timo, the tenrec, a scientist who the King elists to automate everything in the kingdom.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: When Julien embarrasses Maurice, he tries to make up for his transgression, while Mort inadvertently joins an anti-King Julien group.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Tired of the Mayor's needy cowardice, Puss tries to reassure him that he is a hero – but being “brave” quickly goes to the Mayor's head.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Golem, a giant clay enemy Puss has been outrunning for years, comes to San Lorenzo. With Artephius' help, Puss may be able to defeat his foe.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When Hiccup and the Riders discover that Viggo is using two captured Catastrophic Quakens to build a dragon prison, they must help the dragons escape.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: When Dagur comes to Dragon's Edge looking for Heather, Hiccup tries to keep the two siblings apart by teaching Dagur the art of Dragon Riding.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: When the Riders uncover the location of Viggo's Dragon Auction, they must stop him from selling dragons and stealing all the gold in Berk.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Gran announces it’s time to choose a new Thunder Sisters Queen, Ugga assumes she’s got it in the bag. But after a series of challenges (the Thunder Games), it becomes clear Gran might not be ready to step down.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Guy is always surprising Eep with romantic gestures and Eep wants to return the favor. But when Guy proves impossible to surprise, Eep has to step up her game.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Crood and Betterman parents have been struggling to get along – they’re so different! The two couple realize they need some time apart and decide to get away from the farm and each other. Too bad both couples choose to take a break on the same, small beach.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 41
programme.desc: Boss tries to rename the local soccer team to "The Babies", but after Danny gets involved in the popularity race with his name, "The Hot Dogs", the town becomes divided. Boss creates a crack team of Baby Corp employees to game plan solutions to the worst outcomes.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: Boss arranges a sleepover with Quiet Psycho Baby to get access to her father the Mayor's day planner, hoping to plant his own pro-baby agenda. However, staying up all night has the unexpected consequence of delusional over-tiredness! Tim sneaks into an art film and decides he has to be a grown-up now, so Mom and Dad try to "kid" him up again.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: Boss' reign as CEO is threatened by a charming, multiple-dimpled Outside Consultant Baby (OCB) hired by the Board of Directors. Boss, furious that OCB will ruin Baby Corp with his poorly thought out ideas, tries to distract him while Staci adds the finishing touches to a project that will make OCB unnecessary, The 24 Hour Diaper.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Tom and Thunder train a new species of aggressive tidal dragons to help the other riders put out a forest fire threatening ICARIS.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Tom and D’Angelo must come together to help Alex and Jun escape the clutches of the Spiderwings.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Tom and the riders go in search of Thunder and must face a gauntlet of dangerous dragons to find their lost friend. Along the way, Tom reveals his big secret to D’Angelo and Alex.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S2 - EP 25
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of Englan

programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Jims Trollhunting life and his high school life collide when Claire becomes a target for Goblin revenge.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Jim must surrender to Bular and unlock the Killahead Bridge to save kidnapped Blinky and promises Claire that he will get her brother back.

programme.title: The Loud House S8 - EP 803
programme.desc: Afraid of failing her PE exam again, Lucy recruits the Morticians Club to help her pass.

programme.title: The Loud House S6 - EP 610
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: The Loud House S1 - EP 114
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay S1 - EP 111
programme.desc: Sadie, Lay Lay, and the Alexander family go to church for their monthly visit. Sadie tries to show everyone she is ready to become a junior deacon. Lay Lay struggles with the guilt of eating Bryce's special ice cream and experiences strange glitches.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover S1 - EP 105

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: The Wagners stand accused of murdering eight members of the Rhoden family over a bitter child custody dispute.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 5
programme.desc: The peaceful town of Mountain City, TN, is rocked when a beloved young couple is found brutally murdered in their home.

programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.desc: When the body of a Jane Doe is found dumped on a roadside, it's up to Dr. Satish Chundru to identify her and find out how she died, spawning an investigation retracing the victim's last night.

programme.title: The Jars Murderer
programme.desc: After murdering and dismembering his victims, a Hong Kong taxi driver often kept their organs and indulged in necrophilia.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: When a 70-year-old grandmother passes away suspiciously on a road trip, investigators uncover a sinister murder plot while searching for her remains.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: 26-year-old Timothy 'Rambo' Ramsey is killed in a drive-by shooting, but the investigation yields little evidence, and the case goes cold for six years.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A suspect crashes into a jail; a woman has too much fun at the movies; a vandal wreaks havoc at a winery; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: an innocent woman insists on going to jail with her arrested BFF; a thief absconds with a giant life-size stick figure; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Residents of Robeson, Pennsylvania were stunned when Ashley Kline went missing on New Year's Eve. The 12-day search turned up several suspects until investigators uncovered suspicious text messages.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 3
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 4
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence - EP 10
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old transgender social media influencer goes silent, her family and fans fear foul play. Digital data ultimately allows detectives to track the movements of their suspect.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: A first-timer is arrested for reckless driving while on the way to vacation, and a man is brought in on a brandishing a firearm charge while open-carrying in Virginia Beach.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores one of the darkest periods in Earth's history: the worst mass extinction the planet has ever seen, when as much as 90% of all species died 252 million years ago. This extraordinary moment in Earth's history took life to the brink, wreaking havoc and destruction on an unprecedented scale. But, somehow, life found a way to bounce back, and a new geological era ushered in the age of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Spice Trail Adventure S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: The last leg of Joanna Lumley's journey takes her by dhow to Zanzibar, the spice island of Africa where merchants from around the world have left their mark on the architecture, religion and music. Her journey ends at the one of the great wonders of the world, the ancient city of Petra.

programme.title: The Last Overland S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile and Syria at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia.

programme.title: Paddy and Chris: Road Tripping S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Paddy and Chris head to Sweden to get back to nature and embody 'friluftsliv'. It can lower stress and improve mental health, but can they embrace nature to get the reboot needed?

programme.title: Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: Our Guy in Vietnam S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: On the famous Ho Chi Minh Trail, Guy visits a Huey helicopter graveyard, makes his own version of napalm and comes face to face with a live cluster bomb left over from the war.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores one of the darkest periods in Earth's history: the worst mass extinction the planet has ever seen, when as much as 90% of all species died 252 million years ago. This extraordinary moment in Earth's history took life to the brink, wreaking havoc and destruction on an unprecedented scale. But, somehow, life found a way to bounce back, and a new geological era ushered in the age of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S06 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hurricane Milton unleashes devastating tornadoes across Florida. Fierce winds fuel relentless fires in Maui. And a sailor battles for his life after being struck by lightning off Panama's coast.

programme.title: Asia S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Remarkable people are dedicating their lives to saving Asia's extraordinary wildlife using ingenious solutions. In Borneo, we follow a sun bear being released back into the wild, and in Java we see how a breeding programme is saving the Javan green magpie. In Japan, orphaned shark embryos are being raised in an artificial uterus. And off Bali, fishermen are trialling new technology that could stop rare species being caught in their nets.

programme.title: Extreme Fishing with Robson Green S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Robson visits the Central American fishing utopia of Panama, to fish for tarpon, oysters and yellowfin tuna.

programme.desc: The team travel through Azerbaijan, Georgia and Turkey, where they re-join the First Overland route at last. Now it's a road-race through Europe to be home in time for Christmas.

programme.desc: Robson lands in Florida, where he challenges himself to catch an aggressive bull shark.

programme.title: Expedition Killer Whale S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: In Antarctica, the most sophisticated hunting behaviour in the animal kingdom takes place - killer whales creating waves to wash seals off pieces of floating ice. A team of scientists and filmmakers travel to these freezing waters to find out more about these unique animals and how they do it. And one of the scientists is looking for one killer whale in particular. But their mission is not just to deepen our understanding of this extraordinary hunting behaviour.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: Nick nicknames his new adventure 'The Volcano Express' as he is travelling from Mount Vesuvius to Mount Etna on a journey from Naples to Sicily.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Earth's terrifying journey into the deep freeze starts with fire, not ice. 800 million years ago, long before the age of the dinosaurs, before there was even animal life, the giant supercontinent Rodinia breaks up. Earth's vast powerful tectonic forces rip the land apart, kicking off a series of events that results in huge amounts of carbon dioxide being sucked from the atmosphere and sending global temperatures plummeting.
